notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jake Burger reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Chris Bassitt. Brandon Nimmo scores. Wyatt Langford to 3rd. Jake Burger to 2nd. Jake Burger advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Chris Bassitt.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Burger reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Chris Bassitt. Brandon Nimmo scores. Wyatt Langford to 3rd. Jake Burger to 2nd. Jake Burger advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Chris Bassitt.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen singles on a ground ball to shortstop Gunnar Henderson. Jake Burger to 3rd.
